'''vabatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feastday|feastday]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-b-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feastday|feastday]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vabatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væbæthæth|væbæthæth]] || [[word:væbæthæj|væbæthæj]] || [[word:væbæthæsh|væbæthæsh]] || [[word:væbæthæ|væbæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vababathath|vababathath]] || [[word:vababathaj|vababathaj]] || [[word:vababathash|vababathash]] || [[word:vababatha|vababatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vabathath|vabathath]] || [[word:vabathaj|vabathaj]] || [[word:vabathash|vabathash]] || [[word:vabatha|vabatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vabafthath|vabafthath]] || [[word:vabafthaj|vabafthaj]] || [[word:vabafthash|vabafthash]] || [[word:vabafthaf|vabafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vabathatha|vabathatha]] || [[word:vabathaja|vabathaja]] || [[word:vabathasha|vabathasha]] || [[word:vabathaka|vabathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vabathath|vabathath]] || [[word:vabathaj|vabathaj]] || [[word:vabathash|vabathash]] || [[word:vabatha|vabatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vabathathal|vabathathal]] || [[word:vabathajal|vabathajal]] || [[word:vabathashal|vabathashal]] || [[word:vabathakal|vabathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vabathathatha|vabathathatha]] || [[word:vabathajaja|vabathajaja]] || [[word:vabathashasha|vabathashasha]] || [[word:vabathaka|vabathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vabathathan|vabathathan]] || [[word:vabathajan|vabathajan]] || [[word:vabathashan|vabathashan]] || [[word:vabathakan|vabathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vabathathaoro|vabathathaoro]] || [[word:vabathajaoro|vabathajaoro]] || [[word:vabathashaoro|vabathashaoro]] || [[word:vabathakaoro|vabathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
